The '''djorra''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Color/Legends|purple]] [[Vine/Legends|vine]] that was native to [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]],<ref name="Missed" /> an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]].<ref name="Geo51">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of {{JournalCite|7|Missed Chance}} to [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].</ref> a series of djorra vines grew across the face of a [[Garqi vehicle shed|vehicle shed]] used by former-[[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] investigator [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] to hide his [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]].<ref name="Missed" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Michael A. Stackpole]] created the djorra vine for his short story "[[Missed Chance]]," first published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 7|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 7]] in [[August]] [[1995]].<ref name="Missed" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|7|Missed Chance|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
